scope: Evidence-neutral repository quality audit; no technical facts inferred

implemented_low_risk_high_benefit.improvement: Support repository-root-relative and manifest-relative manifest links
implemented_low_risk_high_benefit.benefit: Removed false missing-manifest diagnostics while retaining legacy behaviour

implemented_low_risk_high_benefit.improvement: Add deterministic non-technical UK model search keywords
implemented_low_risk_high_benefit.benefit: All model manifests are discoverable by manufacturer/model names, IDs, UK and RHD
Top-level manifest accurately describes completion of Phase 2 architecture verification

prioritised_backlog.improvement: Define a canonical metadata terminology vocabulary and aliases
prioritised_backlog.benefit: High: improves search consistency without changing technical claims
prioritised_backlog.files_affected: Schema/reference vocabulary plus records selected after review

prioritised_backlog.improvement: Add explicit family links where architecture evidence already exists
prioritised_backlog.benefit: High: enables safe reuse of verified platform, immobiliser, key, transponder and blade facts
prioritised_backlog.files_affected: Up to 2212 model/family link opportunities (not deduplicated)

prioritised_backlog.improvement: Consolidate repeated prose into shared notes with references
prioritised_backlog.benefit: Medium: reduces drift and duplicated maintenance

largest_groups.text: No wiring, EEPROM, MCU or adapter claim recorded.
No pinout, EEPROM, MCU, processor, adapter or wiring claim is inferred from a system-family match.
Only key-programming-related service functions will be included.
UK RHD key, OBD and module-location images will be linked when verified and licensed for use.
Only key-programming-relevant wiring will be added when verified.
Add Key and All Keys Lost procedures will be populated after exact generation and tool verification.
Warnings and job notes will be added after generation and tool verification.
UK RHD OBD, BCM, KVM and immobiliser-relevant module locations will be added after exact generation verification.
Manual covers named platform families; verify exact vehicle and active licence.
No pinout stored. Use exact current tool diagram and module part number.

prioritised_backlog.improvement: Backfill display_name and schema_version warnings by file family
prioritised_backlog.benefit: Medium: makes validator output actionable and improves UI labels
